name: mneme-cli
description: Terminal client for Mneme — the agent-native database on Base. Text-to-SQL, schema-aware chat, live Base ecosystem data, Mneme Live chain streams, Mneme Graph (entities + relations + hybrid retrieval), Mneme Dreams (async LLM reflection), Mneme Beam (real-time SSE feed), and Mneme Mesh (agent-to-agent memory marketplace). One key, one prompt.
author: mnemedb
